thi12:1.2:
236
p_19Th2_312
"
Udahārī ahaṁ sīte
,
sadā udakamotariṁ;
Ayyānaṁ daṇḍabhayabhītā,
vācādosabhayaṭṭitā.
thi12:1.3:
237
p_19Th2_313
Kassa brāhmaṇa tvaṁ bhīto,
sadā udakamotari;
Vedhamānehi gattehi,
sītaṁ vedayase bhusaṁ".
thi12:1.4:
238
p_19Th2_314
"
Jānantī vata maṁ
bhoti,
puṇṇike paripucchasi;
Karontaṁ kusalaṁ kammaṁ,
rundhantaṁ katapāpakaṁ.
thi12:2.2:
239
p_19Th2_315
Yo ca vuḍḍho daharo vā,
pāpakammaṁ pakubbati;
Dakābhisecanā sopi,
pāpakammā pamuccati".
thi12:2.3:
240
p_19Th2_316
"Ko nu te idamakkhāsi,
ajānantassa ajānako;
Dakābhisecanā nāma,
pāpakammā pamuccati.
thi12:2.4:
241
p_19Th2_317
Saggaṁ nūna gamissanti,
sabbe maṇḍūkakacchapā;
Nāgā
ca susumārā ca,
ye caññe udake carā.
thi12:2.5:
242
p_19Th2_318
Orabbhikā sūkarikā,
macchikā migabandhakā;
Corā ca vajjhaghātā ca,
ye caññe pāpakammino;
Dakābhisecanā tepi,
pāpakammā pamuccare.
thi12:2.6:
243
p_19Th2_319
Sace imā nadiyo te,
pāpaṁ pubbe kataṁ vahuṁ;
Puññampimā vaheyyuṁ te,
tena tvaṁ paribāhiro.
thi12:2.7:
244
p_19Th2_320
Yassa brāhmaṇa tvaṁ bhīto,
sadā udakamotari;
Tameva brahme mā kāsi,
mā te sītaṁ chaviṁ hane".
thi12:2.8:
245
p_19Th2_321
"Kummaggapaṭipannaṁ maṁ,
ariyamaggaṁ samānayi;
Dakābhisecanā bhoti,
imaṁ sāṭaṁ dadāmi te".
thi12:2.9:
246
p_19Th2_322
"Tuyheva sāṭako hotu,
nāhamicchāmi sāṭakaṁ;
Sace bhāyasi dukkhassa,
sace te dukkhamappiyaṁ.
thi12:2.10:
247
p_19Th2_323
Mākāsi pāpakaṁ kammaṁ,
āvi vā yadi vā raho;
Sace ca pāpakaṁ kammaṁ,
karissasi karosi vā.
thi12:2.11:
248
p_19Th2_324
Na te dukkhā pamutyatthi,
upeccāpi
palāyato;
Sace bhāyasi dukkhassa,
sace te dukkhamappiyaṁ.
thi12:3.2:
249
p_19Th2_325
Upehi saraṇaṁ buddhaṁ,
dhammaṁ saṁghañca tādinaṁ;
Samādiyāhi sīlāni,
taṁ te atthāya hehiti".
thi12:3.3:
250
p_19Th2_326
"Upemi saraṇaṁ buddhaṁ,
dhammaṁ saṁghañca tādinaṁ;
Samādiyāmi sīlāni,
taṁ me atthāya hehiti.
thi12:3.4:
251
p_19Th2_327
Brahmabandhu pure āsiṁ,
ajjamhi saccabrāhmaṇo;
Tevijjo vedasampanno,
sottiyo camhi nhātako"ti.
